title: Daewoo Kensington, Jug Kettle Electric, Stainless Steel, Family Size, Fast Boil, Auto Shut Off, 360 Swivel Base, Cord Storage, Power Indicator, Removable Filter For Easy Cleaning, Grey
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: THE KENSINGTON COLLECTION – The sleek and stylish stainless-steel collection with 360 degrees swivel base and cord storage will keep your kitchen refreshed and tidy. Shop the full collection in the range of colours, starting with our jug kettle

GENEROUS 1.7 L CAPACITY – Suitable to have your friends over for a brew with a generous 1.7L capacity making roughly 7cups on one full boil, as well as a drip-free spout for mess-free pouring, while refilling has never been easier with our removable lid

SAFETY FEATURES – The kettle will automatically shut off when water reaches boiling, the LED light will illuminate indicating when the kettle is in use and the easy to view water window helps you monitor how much water is your kettle for convenience

CONCEALED HEATING ELEMENTS – Improves safety by preventing lime scale build-up, providing boil dry protection designed to prevent overheating resulting in a longer lifespan. Making cleaning easier, boiling faster and water potentially better-tasting

3 YEAR WARRENTY – Giving you peace of mind and ensuring you can rely on your Daewoo kettle for years to come, subject to online registration. Enjoy hot water for your brews, coffee and hot chocolate any time of the day
description: Introducing the Daewoo Kensington Collection Jug Kettle! The perfect addition to your home or office, with its large 1.7 litre capacity and drip free spout, this kettle is ideal for preparing large batches of hot beverages, while ensuring mess-free pouring every time. Use your kettle safely with an LED light indictor that will illuminate when your kettle is in use and your water is boiling, while the automatic shut off will stop your kettle when the water reaches boiling point and is ready to pour. The easy viewing window allows you to monitor the water level inside the kettle with ease, so you can see when you need to top it up. The removable filter makes cleaning easy, simply remove, rinse and return to prevent limescale build up. The concealed heating element will work inside to also prevent limescale build up keeping your water tasting fresh. With the Kensington collection you can enjoy high quality and reliability with your appliance but for your peace of mind we offer 3 years

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Stylish, 1.7 Litre capacity, Base cord storage, 360 swivel base, Rapid boil, LED light indicator, Water window, Cordless kettle, Auto shut off, Extra wide opening lid, Removable filter, Concealed heating element, Boil dry protection
